digest.greeting: Tuesday, June 16, Jean. Outlook shows 6 meetings plus one protected block, anchored by the 9:15 AM IT/EPMO Next Steps check-in, the 2:00 PM PM Workshop, and a tight 3:00-4:30 PM run of Yuri, Jhara, and scoping discussions. There are 0 carried-over items from the latest daily digest, 2 active reminders, and 2 urgent priorities: organize the Venn ticket/open-issues path before Danny and Nico come back with IT updates, and confirm the leadership project-wins summary before tomorrow's presentation. Teams broad-thread access returned a Microsoft Graph 403 again, and targeted Teams searches did not surface new matching activity, so today's operating view relies on Outlook, email, dashboard state, and prior digest continuity.

items.label: Follow up with David on the COE playbook
items.detail: Scheduled dashboard reminder for today: "Seguimiento a David para la creacion del COE playbook." Use the morning open space or tomorrow's David 1:1 to confirm the next owner, expected output, and timing. This scheduled reminder will archive after today's digest.

items.label: Collect Venn-related IT ticket numbers from TMs
items.detail: One-shot dashboard reminder added yesterday. Danny replied that he and Nico expect to come back Tuesday or Wednesday with IT project updates and may need Jean's help organizing ticket numbers, outstanding issues, and open questions. Treat this as the clean prep path for the IT/EPMO follow-up.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The morning is relatively workable until noon; the afternoon is compressed from PM Workshop through the scoping call.

items.label: IT/EPMO Next Steps
items.detail: Danny Miller's 15-minute meeting is framed as updates for partnering between teams. Bring the Venn ticket-number/open-issues reminder here if IT/EPMO coordination is part of the discussion.

items.label: 1:1 Conor B. & Jean G.
items.detail: Agenda includes department needs, how Jean can provide support, and project-management principles to improve outcomes. Good venue for surfacing any support model or intake friction.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected 90-minute block before PM Workshop. Best use: Venn ticket collection, COE playbook follow-up, and leadership-project highlights cleanup.

items.label: PM Workshop Pt.2
items.detail: Today's topic is controlling projects through stakeholders, with Mar, Yuri, and Jhara invited. This should connect directly to the afternoon 1:1s on roadblocks and next steps.

items.label: 1:1 Yuri & Jean
items.detail: Short follow-up window after PM Workshop. Use it to confirm Staff Aug or report-requirements items that need Yuri's input.

items.label: 1:1 Jhara & Jean
items.detail: Agenda explicitly lists portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Bring any post-workshop stakeholder-control or portfolio blockers that need a named next step.

items.label: Scoping Call: RNWLS - Missing EAD Inquiry & SUPP - Post-submission Case Change
items.detail: Thirty-minute scoping call with Jessica Richburg. It lands immediately after the Yuri/Jhara block, so prep the scope questions before 3:00 PM if possible.

items.label: 8:00-9:15, 9:30-10:00, 10:30-12:00, 12:00-1:30, and 1:30-2:00
items.detail: The 10:30-12:00 and 12:00-1:30 windows are the strongest operating space. After 2:00 PM the day becomes handoff-heavy.

items.label: Review Incident Response survey exports
items.detail: Action type: review/decide. Nikki sent two Rippling CSV exports with individual responses and comments, noting a 72% response rate from 1,608 participants. Decide whether Jean needs a summary, analysis owner, or next readout before the results sit as raw data.

items.label: Confirm leadership project-wins summary
items.detail: Action type: reply/review. Nadia asked Yuri and Javier for one-to-two-line project-win statements before EOB Monday for Sara and Danny's June 17 leadership presentation, including a draft Staff Augmentation win statement. The email is still unread, so confirm whether the summary is final or still needs Jean's input.

items.label: Close the Frank report-requirements task
items.detail: Action type: follow up. Planner email shows "Check w/ Frank the report requirements" due today, with prior context around report fields and folder 5 requirements. Use the Yuri 1:1 or a quick message to confirm what remains and who owns the next step.

items.label: Prepare the workshop-to-1:1 handoff
items.detail: Action type: prepare/delegate. PM Workshop Pt.2 is about stakeholder control, followed immediately by Yuri and Jhara 1:1s. Capture the stakeholder-control takeaway, then turn portfolio roadblocks and next steps into named owners before the 4:00 PM scoping call.

items.label: Review Sara's Weekly EPMO Portfolio Update
items.detail: Unread email from Sara sent just after midnight with this week's Executive Portfolio Update. The preview references Venn Enforcement Wave 2 and related portfolio updates; review it before the IT/EPMO and afternoon portfolio-roadblock conversations if those topics come up.

items.label: Triage the Business Development intake alert
items.detail: Unread Asana intake alert from Janet lists Santiago Paz as submitter for Business Development. Decide whether this belongs in today's portfolio routing, tomorrow's EPMO Team Meeting, or a separate intake call.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: Short Yuri touchpoint. Useful follow-up if the leadership-project highlights or Staff Aug risk story still needs cleanup.

items.label: 1:1 David & Jean, then Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: David at 10:30 AM and Sara at 11:30 AM create a good window for COE playbook and portfolio/leadership follow-through.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected midday space before EPMO Team Meeting.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting
items.detail: Operational updates, lessons learned, celebrations, project spotlights, and EPMO how-tos. Good place for any project-wins or intake-routing updates that are ready.

items.label: Focus time: weekly meeting preparation
items.detail: End-of-day focus block for Thursday/Friday meeting prep.

reminderHistory.text: Seguimiento a stakeholders de Co-counsel network project. Go/no-go?
Hacer follow up con HR para resultados de la survey
Responder al correo de Eugenia para Danny sobre problemas con Venn
Seguimiento a David para la creación del COE playbook
solicitar a TMs los numeros de sus tickets de IT relacionados a Venn
